name: C-2 control mapping: legal-review-mark emits an update confirmation line on stderr so audit logs capture it
command:
printf -- '- framework: soc2
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: pending
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework soc2 --control-id CC1.1 --reviewer counsel --date 2026-05-04 --controls-file controls.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'updated soc2/CC1.1 -> reviewed_by:counsel:2026-05-04' err.txt && echo confirmed 1>&2
